articles.title: Apple fixes bug that cops used to extract deleted chat messages from iPhones
articles.description: The iPhone and iPad bug allowed law enforcement using forensic tools to read messages that had long been deleted by the Signal app.
articles.summary: Apple has fixed a security flaw that previously enabled police forces and investigators from different countries to access past deleted chats through iPhones via forensic tools.
points: A bug in Apple's software allowed law enforcement to bypass the Signal app' end-to-end encryption mechanism, revealing users' previous conversations that were believed to be secure and irretrievably lost due to deletion within the last six weeks.

This exploit was possible through a loophole in iPhones when forensic tools accessed the device while locked or offline but still connected via USB-C port, allowing them to retrieve messages from memory dumps without triggering Signal's alert system that notifies users of deleted chats.

The bug had been known since 2019 by security researchers and only became publicly visible after the Apple developer community discovered it in April. The fix for this vulnerability, which could potentially expose sensitive user data to unauthorized third parties including law enforcement agencies without a warrant or legal justification, has been deployed.
articles.insight: The patching of such security loopholes by tech companies is crucial in protecting users' privacy rights and maintaining user trust. This incident also highlights the ongoing challenges that arise when balancing law enforcement interests with individual data protection, especially as encryption technology becomes more pervasive.

articles.title: From the stage to the future: Where are Startup Battlefield’s alumni now?
articles.description: We wanted to show you what happens after the confetti falls. We checked in with some of our recent alumni, many of whom have sat down with us on Build Mode: The Founder Survival Guide, TechCrunch's podcast for founders at every stage.
articles.summary: The article profiles recent alumni from Startup Battlefield who have become successful entrepreneurs after appearing on the show and sharing their stories.
points: Many of Startup Battlefield's former contestants went onto start, grow and scale their own tech companies successfully
The journey was not always smooth sailing. Some faced challenges that forced them to pivot or rethink business strategies
Despite these obstacles, the alumni network has proven a valuable resource for support, advice, mentorship and potential partnerships
articles.insight: The Startup Battlefield showcase highlights how entrepreneurial experiences on stage can transition to real-world startup success. The challenges faced by contestants often force them to adapt business strategies in ways that contribute positively towards their growth.

articles.title: Google Cloud launches two new AI chips to compete with Nvidia
articles.description: Google's newest TPUs are faster and cheaper than the previous versions. But the company is still embracing Nvidia in its cloud — for now.
articles.summary: Google Cloud has released two advanced AI chips known as TPUs to compete with similar products from companies like Nvidia.
points: The newest versions of Google'in cloud-based TPUs offer better performance while also being more cost-effective than earlier models.
Google Cloud continues its partnership and use of existing solutions, including those offered by competitors such as Nvidia, for current services despite the introduction of their own chips.
These advancements in Google's TPU technology indicate a strategic move to bolster cloud-based AI capabilities without immediate plans to phase out reliance on external hardware providers.
articles.insight: Google Cloud is developing its competencies and infrastructure with the goal of long-term independence from third-party chip manufacturers like Nvidia, reflecting a broader industry trend towards homegrown AI acceleration technologies in cloud services. However, there's no immediate indication that Google will replace current dependencies.

articles.title: Google turns Chrome into an AI co-worker for the workplace
articles.description: Google brings Gemini-powered "auto browse" capabilities to Chrome for enterprise users, letting workers automate tasks like research, data entry, and more.
articles.summary: Google has integrated its AI technology into Google Chrome for corporate clients, enabling employees to perform routine web-based tasks automatically through 'auto browse.'
points: Gemini's integration in enterprise Chrome enables automated research and data entry.
Auto Browse uses context from conversations or calendar events to generate task lists on the fly.
The tool was designed with feedback loops for continuous improvement based on user interactions.
articles.insight: This development could signify a shift towards more AI-assisted daily operations in businesses, potentially increasing efficiency and productivity while reducing manual workload.

articles.title: Threads is adding Live Chats to boost real-time engagement
articles.description: Users can send messages, photos, videos, links, and emoji reactions in Live Chats.
articles.summary: Users can send messages, photos, videos, links, and emoji reactions in Live Chats
points: Users can send messages, photos, videos, links, and emoji reactions in Live Chats
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Google makes an interesting choice with its new agent-building tool for enterprises
articles.description: Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform takes an interesting approach: It is geared for IT and technical users.
articles.summary: Google has introduced the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, designed with a focus on enterprises that require agent-building capabilities tailored to their specific needs.
points: - The Gemini Enterprise Agent (GEM) platform is specifically targeted at IT and technical users in an organization.
- GEM automates the process of building, deploying, configuring, updating, monitoring, securing, troubleshooting enterprise agents to simplify management for businesses across all industries.
- The goal with its new tool is to ease the burden on IT professionals and enable them to focus more on innovation rather than routine tasks.
articles.insight: The introduction of Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform by Google represents a significant shift in enterprise agent management, potentially reducing manual labor while increasing efficiency across various industries. This could encourage other tech companies to develop similar tools tailored for the modern workforce and businesses.

articles.title: AI Overviews are coming to your Gmail at work
articles.description: The AI Overviews will offer instant summaries pulled from across multiple emails.
articles.summary: Google is rolling out 'AI Overviews' in Gmail for work to provide users with quick insights into the content of several related emails at once.
points: The AI will summarize multiple related emails using natural language processing (NLP).
This feature aims to enhance productivity by saving time on sifting through lengthy threads. To enable this, users need to turn it ON in settings under 'Mail.' for G Suite accounts.
Google is continuously improving the AI capabilities of its services.
articles.insight: AI Overviews could significantly boost efficiency within businesses by reducing time spent on reading and replying to lengthy email threads, but it will require users' consent for workplace use due to privacy concerns. This feature highlights Google's ambition in integrating advanced AI directly into the fabric of everyday professional tools like Gmail.

articles.title: Rivian R2 production has started despite tornado damage to factory
articles.description: The company's all-important mass-market EV is just about ready to start heading to customers.
articles.summary: Rivian has begun production of its R2 electric vehicle model despite damage caused by a tornado at the factory.
points: Production of Rivian'sen mass-market EV begins post-tornado
Tornado damages plant, halts early operations to start producing vehicles for customers soon after repairs are made
Company focuses on customer deliveries despite factory destruction
articles.insight: Rivian's decision shows its dedication towards fulfilling demand by quickly addressing production issues following unexpected disaster, potentially strengthening brand reliability and resilience in the EV market.

articles.title: Cosmetics giant Rituals confirms data breach of customer membership records
articles.description: The cosmetics retailer, which counts 41 million customers in its membership data, declined to provide an accurate total number of customers affected.
articles.summary: Cosmetics company Rituals has confirmed a breach affecting customer member records.
points: Rituals confirms data breach with unspecified number of affected customers
41 million in membership but no specific impacted figures given
Fraud alert issued, credit freeze recommendation for members
articles.insight: This incident highlights the increasing cybersecurity challenges within non-tech sectors and calls attention to companies' need to prioritize data protection measures.

articles.title: Cathie Wood’s ARK makes its first lead investment in startup Lucra — and it isn’t AI
articles.description: Lucra offers corporate loyalty programs reimagined as interactive esports. But winning ARK as a lead wasn't easy.
articles.summary: Cathie Wood’s Ark Investment has made its first investment in Lucra, an upstart that redefines corporate loyalty programs through interactive esports.
points: Lucra is not focused on artificial intelligence but rather transforming loyalty programs into engaging experiences with a focus on gaming elements such as leaderboards and challenges.
Winning an investment from Ark, which usually invests in AI-related opportunities, shows the firm's willingness to diversify beyond its typical tech area.
Lucra’s CEO previously led a company called LoyaltyOne that faced financial difficulties and was acquired by JPMorgan Chase & Co.
articles.insight: This investment indicates Ark Investment Management's growing interest in non-AI technology sectors, potentially leading to broader industry implications for corporate loyalty programs through the integration of gaming elements. It also demonstrates an openness within tech firms like ARK to explore novel market segments beyond their traditional focus areas.

articles.title: OpenAI teams up with Infosys to bring AI tools to more businesses
articles.description: Infosys said the integration will be used to help its clients modernize software development, automate workflows, and deploy AI systems, initially focusing software engineering, legacy modernization, and DevOps.
articles.summary: Infosys has partnered with OpenAI to integrate artificial intelligence tools into more of its business processes.
points: The integration will initially focus on software engineering, legacy modernization, and DevOps
OpenAI' endorsement aims to accelerate the deployment of AI systems within Infosys client base
Potential for significant impacts in efficiency and innovation across various sectors
articles.insight: The collaboration between major IT player Infosys and cutting-edge AI research firm OpenAI represents a strategic move to accelerate the incorporation of artificial intelligence into business solutions, potentially setting new standards for technology adoption.

articles.title: UK government says 100 countries have spyware that can hack people’s phones
articles.description: The U.K.'s cybersecurity chief warned that U.K. businesses and critical infrastructure are underestimating the threat from spyware attacks and other cyberthreats, with more governments having access to the powerful surveillance technology than ever.
articles.summary: The UK's National Cyber Security Centre has warned about underestimating spyware threats and increased global availability of such tools.
points: U.K.'s cybersecurity chief highlighted the growing threat from advanced surveillance technology, warning that it is widespread beyond just a few countries known for developing these capabilities.
The National Cyber Security Centre warned UK businesses and critical infrastructure about underestimating spyware threats to their systems.
There are more than 100 countries reportedly having access to surveillance technology capable of hacking phones, indicating a global increase in the availability.
articles.insight: The increasing sophistication and ubiquity of spyware highlights that no industry or sector is immune from cyber threats. As such technologies become more accessible globally, organizations must prioritize updating their security measures to protect against these advanced forms of intrusion.

articles.title: Esther and Anne Wojcicki back new healthcare accelerator, fund
articles.description: Mary Minno launches early-stage startup accelerator program, Treehub, and an early-stage firm, AI Health Fund, aimed at backing startups working at the intersection of healthcare and AI.
articles.summary: Esther and Anne Wojcicki have founded a new accelerator program called Treehub to support early-stage startup companies that blend artificial intelligence with the health sector.
points: The newly launched Treehub is an IT/technology focused investment venture by Esther and Anne Wojcicki.
Treehub seeks startups working on merging AI technology within the field of medicine, highlighting a growing interest in healthcare-focused technological innovation.
With this initiative, Esther and Anne are positioned to play an instrumental role as key investors by providing funding for promising tech startups at early stages.
articles.insight: This news indicates a trend of increasing interest in the convergence of healthcare technology with artificial intelligence. As such, it highlights potential future directions and opportunities within this IT/technology intersection industry.

articles.title: X makes it more expensive to post links through its API
articles.description: Posting links on X through its API is now 1,900% more costly.
articles.summary: X has significantly increased the cost of posting links using their API from $0.02 to $0 end-user.
points: Links posted on X through its API now cost users up to 95 cents per link
The fee increase is due to a recent restructuring by the company aiming at monetizing their platform more effectively
This move could potentially discourage casual sharing and impact user engagement
articles.insight: The price hike in posting links via X's API can alter how users interact with content on the platform, possibly affecting overall activity levels.

articles.title: AI is spitting out more potential drugs than ever. This start-up wants to figure out which ones matter.
articles.description: 10x Science has raised a $4.8 million seed round to help pharmaceutical researchers understand complex molecules.
articles.summary: A startup named AI is revolutionizing drug discovery by using artificial intelligence to generate potential drugs at an unprecedented rate.
points: AI can produce more prospective medicines than ever before, leading to a significant increase in possibilities for pharmaceutical researchers.
$4.8 million seed round has been secured by AI's backer to aid the understanding of complex molecules through advanced technology.
articles.insight: This development could drastically reduce time and costs associated with drug discovery, while also increasing precision in targeting diseases using artificial intelligence-generated medications. However, validation processes must be implemented effectively for ensuring accuracy to avoid potential risks related with the reliance on AI.

articles.title: Exclusive: Google deepens Thinking Machines Lab ties with new multi-billion-dollar deal
articles.description: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab has signed a multi-billion-dollar deal with Google Cloud for AI infrastructure powered by Nvidia's latest GB300 chips, TechCrunch has exclusively learned.
articles.summary: Thinking Machines Lab (TML) signed a multi-billion-dollar deal with Google Cloud to use AI infrastructure powered by Nvidia's latest chips for its large language models.
points: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab has partnered with Google Cloud, utilizing the GB300 chip technology from Nvidia to enhance their LLM capabilities.
This multi-billion-dollar deal represents a significant investment in advanced hardware for AI applications and models by TML.
The collaboration between these companies highlights the importance of robust computational resources when training large language models.
articles.insight: Large technology firms continue to prioritize high-performance computing infrastructure, indicating its critical role in advancing AI research and applications. This partnership is likely a strategic move by TML to stay competitive in the field of generative models.

articles.title: “속도보다 방향, 통제보다 신뢰”...OWASP 세미나서 엿본 보안 조직 성장기

articles.title: 이란 정보국의 ‘다중 인격’ 해킹 전술? 독립 해커인 척하며 세계 안보 농락해
articles.description: 이란 정보국, 3개 해커 조직으로 위장해 장기간 사이버 공작 수행14개월 잠복 후 데이터 탈취·파괴하고 심리전까지 병행동일 인프라로 ‘보이드 맨티코어’ 실체 드러나... 국가 배후 해킹 경고[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 이란 정보국(MOIS)이 그동안 ‘홈랜드 저스티스’, ‘카르마’, ‘한다라’라는 세 개의 독립된 해커 집단으로 위장해 치밀한 사이버 공작을 펼쳐
articles.summary: 이란 정보국이 독립해커들과의 혼오버를 시도하여 국가 보호 전용 플러스에서 접근하여 공격을 발생
points: 이란 정보국과 모든 다음 해커들로부터 테이블당 데이터를 수강하고 겹쳐나
여기서의 공격이 보호 전용 플러스에서 시작했다는 사실을 인식하려고 모든 해커들이 노부로 대체함
이런 공격은 해커들이 보호매장에서의 전용 플러스가 어떤 환경을 만들어내는지, 그리고 해커들의 이렇게 특수한 방식에 대비해서 국가보호를 강조할 수 있다
articles.insight: 이런 공격은 MOIS의 코로나 보호 전용 플러스의 성공한 시대에서 느낌을 끄덽고, 해커들이 이절으로 사라지게 취약해소

articles.title: 넥스원소프트, 표준 전자서명 기술로 공공 마이데이터 연계 고도화
articles.description: 서민금융진흥원 플랫폼 회원가입 및 정보 확인 기능에 안전한 인증 환경 구축법적 효력 갖춘 인증서 기반 체계로의 원활한 전환 돕는 가이드라인 제시[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 넥스원소프트는 서민금융진흥원에 공공 마이데이터 활용 연계를 위한 통합인증 서비스 ‘넥스비싸인’(NexBe Sign)을 제공한다고 22일 밝혔다. 회사는 이 프로젝트를 통해 공공 마이데이터 분
articles.summary: 넥스원소프트는 공공 마이데이터 연계를 위한 통합인증서 '넥스비싸인'을 제공하여, 기술 시스템을 이용하는 것에서 효과적인 인증 서비스를 도ㄟ로 한국어로 요약
points: - '넥스비싸인'이란 공공 마이데이터 사용자가 정보 신분을 확인하고 회원가입에 대한 인증 서비스를 만들어준다.
- 이 프로젝트는 기술 시스템을 통해 공공 마이데이터에 액세스하고, 사용자가 정보를 신분직에 위치시키면서 인증을 행한다.
- 넥스원소프트은 IT/기술 업계의 연계 및 인증 도구를 개방하고 있는 신뢰한 인증 서비스를 제공하여, 공공 마이데이터에 직접으로 연계할 수 있도록 행보다는 온라인으로 관리한다.
articles.insight: 이 기사에서 넥스원소프트가 제공하는 '넥스비싸인'은 IT/기술 업체에서 공규화되어 있지만, 국내익칭이 크며, 공공 마이데이터 사용자들과의 질의와 인증을 연계하는 데에 도웃주를 보장함

articles.title: [미토스 충격] ‘철저 보안’ 미공개 미토스, 디스코드 채널 사용자에게 뚫렸다?
articles.description: ’프로젝트 글래스윙’ 구성원에게만 제한적으로 공개된 미토스에 비인가 접근 발생협력사 직원 권한 등 이용해 접근 권한 획득[보안뉴스 한세희 기자] 사이버 보안 우려로 소수 조직만 접근이 허용된 앤트로픽 새 인공지능(AI) 모델 ‘클로드 미토스’ 프리뷰 버전에 권한 없는 사용자가 무단 접속한 사실이 드러났고 블룸버그가 21일(현지시간) 보도했다. 미토스는 사이
articles.summary: 미토스 '클로드 미토스' AI 모델에는 사용자 권한이 없으며, 그래픽 서비스인 YouTube 구성원에게만 제한적으로 공개된 미토스에 접근하여 무단 접속하는 사건이 드러나 있음
points: AI '클로드 미토스' AI 모델에는 사용자 권한이 없고 YouTube 구성원만 제한적으로 공개된 미토스에 접속하여 무단 접속
소수 조직이 '미토스'의 권한을 위해 사용
블룸버그가 YouTube에서 이러한 무단 접속을 보도했다
articles.insight: 이러한 무단 접속은 AI 모델의 사용자 권한 제약에서 나온 현상으로, 클로드 미토스의 공개된 정보와 권한이 모호하게 포인트를 제시한다.

articles.title: “검색 최상단 떴다고 믿지 마세요”... 안랩, 클로드 사칭 피싱 사이트 경고

articles.title: 벨로크-퓨리오사AI, 국산 NPU로 ‘지능형 CCTV’ 시장 정조준... MOU 체결
articles.description: “실시간 분석” 및 “전력 절감” 극대화... GPU 대비 압도적 운영 효율 확보 산업 안전 및 지자체 스마트시티 보안 시장 타겟 기술 고도화 추진과기정통부 ‘공공 AX(AI 전환) 7대 선도과제’ 연계... 지능형 CCTV 확산 주도[보안뉴스 원병철 기자] 통합 보안 솔루션 기업 벨로크(bellock)는 국내 대표 AI 반도체 기업 퓨리오사AI(Furio
articles.summary: 벨로크(bellock)과 국산 NPU 기술기계는 '지능형 CCTV' 시장을 정조하고 있으며 GPU 대비에 기술된 '공공 AX(AI 전환)' 계약을 국산 NPU로 신규 진행.
points: - 벨로크(bellock)과 국산 NPU 기술기계가 '지능형 CCTV' 시장의 정호ряд화를 위해 GPU 대비를 줄이고 있음.
- GPU 대비에 강한 솔루션을 제공하여 산업 안전성과 보안 시장에 확률적으로 기술이 진화.
- '공공 AX(AI 전환)' 계정은 충당한다는 것을 강조하고 이를 기업들에게 미래의 위기로 보여준다.
articles.insight: 이러한 확산과정은 공공 인화와 기술기업이 지능 시장에서의 경쟁으로 인한 우려를 최소화하고 기술 인버스트로움을 확보한다.

articles.title: 또 뚫린 프랑스 공공 인프라... 이번엔 ANTS 포털 해킹
articles.description: 국가 안전 서류 관리하는 핵심 서버 공격받아 주소와 전화번호 유출파리 검찰청 즉각 수사 착수했으나, 표적형 피싱 범죄 예방에 비상 걸려[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 프랑스 공공 포털이 관리자 신원을 도용한 해킹 공격에 무너졌다. 2단계 인증을 비롯한 방어 수단을 마련하고 있지만, 정식 계정을 탈취하는 방식의 공격에 기존의 보안 시스템이 무용지물이 됐다는 비판을
articles.summary: 포털에서의 공격없이 피해졌는 아니지만, 보안시스템이 못하다
points: 큰 공격없이 공격불량인 확인
원산서비스가 사용하는 보안시스템의 문제점
공격자의 방어 전략이 창의적으로 개선되지 않았음
articles.insight: 통신기기의 보안성에서 국가는 우연한 현상이라도 이해하고자 합니다.

articles.title: “보안 사고, 기술 아닌 실행 부재에서 시작”... 아톤, ‘시큐리티 서밋 2026’ 개최
articles.description: 양자보안부터 제로트러스트, 피싱방어까지 총 망라[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 아톤(대표 우길수)이 보안 실무자들에게 기업이 지금 당장 실행할 수 있는 보안 전략을 제시한다.아톤은 오는 5월 13일 여의도 FKI타워 그랜드볼룸에서 ‘아톤 시큐리티 서밋 2026’을 개최한다고 22일 밝혔다.이번 행사는 아톤이 단독 주관하는 첫 대규모 보안 컨퍼런스다. 은행·증권사
articles.summary: 아톤이 보안 전략을 제시한다.
points: - 첫 대규모 보안 컨퍼런스 개최
- 기업이 지금 실행할 수 0 있는 보안 전략을 제시한다.
- 영국의 아톤이 '시큐리티 서밋 2026'를 개석한다.
articles.insight: 아톤은 IT/기술 업체에서 보안 전략의 중요성을 강조하고, 새로운 전략이 개석되는 계기가 질체적으로 드문다.

articles.title: 분산형 소셜 미디어 블루스카이, 친이란 해커 그룹 공격에 서비스 장애
articles.description: 블루스카이 서비스 장애는 DDoS 공격 때문친이란 ‘313 팀’ 자신들 소행이라 주장[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] X(구 트위터)의 대안으로 주목받는 분산형 소셜 미디어 블루스카이(Bluesky)는 최근 발생한 서비스 장애가 외부 세력에 의한 디도스(DDoS) 공격 때문이라고 밝혔다. 블루스카이에 대한 공격은 15일(현지시간) 시작돼 게시물 목록(Feed)

articles.title: KISA, 지구의 날 맞아 ‘에너지·보안 6대 실천 수칙’ 발표
articles.description: 기후 위기 심화와 에너지 수급 불안 극복하기 위한 생활 속 디지털 통합 가이드 제안미사용 기기 전원 차단과 2단계 인증 설정 비롯한 ‘절전과 방어’ 중심 행동 지침[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 한국인터넷진흥원(KISA)은 지구의 날을 맞아 에너지 절약과 정보보호를 동시에 실천할 수 있는 ‘6대 실천 수칙’을 22일 밝혔다. 이번 실전 수칙은 기후 위기 심화와 에
articles.summary: KISA는 기후 위기와 에너지 절약과 보안을 위한 6대 실천 수치를 제시하여, 인간의 일상에서 보안과 절액성을 모두 추구합니다.
points: - 기후 위기와 인류가 보호하고 지리학습에서의 인식취미를 통한 에너지 절액성을 강조합니다.
- 6대 수칙은 인류가 주로 청소제공기, LED 전지, 정보보호를 통한 보안적인 에너지 사용 방식을 이해하도록 돕습니다.
- 일상으로 2단계인증 기기 전원 차단으로 부터의 보호적인 시장 활동을 강조합니다.
articles.insight: KISA는 인류가 지구의 세계에서 절액성과 보안에 어떤 역할을 참고하고 있는지, 그리고 이를 통해 인간들이 더욱 논리적으로 보안과 에너지 와기가 작동하도록 자연스렴한 방식을 선정한 실천 수칙이다.

articles.title: 포티넷, ‘2026 구글 클라우드 올해의 파트너상’ 워크로드 보안 부문 수상
articles.description: 포티CNAPP, 클라우드 보안 태세 관리·워크로드 보호·위협 탐지 통합[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 글로벌 네트워크 보안 융합 솔루션 기업 포티넷(CEO 켄 지)이 ‘2026 구글 클라우드 올해의 파트너상’ 워크로드 보안 부문을 수상했다고 22일 밝혔다. 포티넷은 클라우드 네이티브 애플리케이션 보호 플랫폼 ‘포티CNAPP’를 통해 하이브리드 및 멀티클라우드 환경
articles.summary: 포티CNAPP은 2026년 구글 클라우드에서의 파트너상에서 보안적용을 기다리고 있음
points: 2026년 구글 클라우드에서 포티CNAPP이 하이브리드 및 멀티클라우드 환경에서 보안을 강화함
2nerve 커뮤니템 시스템의 개념있는 보안 플랫폼을 소개한다.
구글이 첨부하는 충당한 기사를 통해 CEO는 모든 공정에서 보안의 중요성을 강조하고 있다.
articles.insight: 이러한 보안 제출은 IT/기술 업계에서 큰 이론적인 의미를 가지고 있다. CEO는 모든 클라우드 요원들이 보안에 대한 이해와 중요성을 약속했다.

articles.title: 이원태 국가AI전략위 보안특위 위원장 ‘홍조 근정훈장’... “AI 시대 보안정책 수준 제고”
articles.description: “AI 시대 선제적 ICT 규범 정립 및 보안 정책 수준 제고 공로”[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 이원태 국가인공지능전략위원회 보안 특별위원회 위원장이 이재명 대통령으로부터 ‘홍조 근정훈장’을 수훈했다. AI 시대 ICT 규범 및 보안 정책 수준에 기여한 데 따른 것이다. 21일 한국과학기술회관에서 열린 ‘2026년 과학·정보통신의 날 기념식’에서 과학 기술·정
articles.summary: 국가AI인공지능전략위원회 보안위원장이 AI 시대에 필요한 ICT 규벌과 보안 정책의 기준을 제출했다.
points: 국가AI인공지능전략위원회 보안위원장이 ICT 규벌과 보안 정책의 기준을 제출한다.
대통령 이재명이 ‘홍조 근정훈장’에 등장한다.
AI 시대 보안정책의 수준을 기여하고, 2026년 과학·정보통신의 날 기념식에서 활동한다.
articles.insight: 국가AI인공지능전략위원회 보안위원장이 ICT 규벌과 보안 정책을 연계시키고, AI 시대에 따른 보안 필요가 등장했다.

articles.title: [특별기고] 새로운 클라우드 보안 인증제도에 바란다
articles.description: 안전한 클라우드 운영이 소버린 AI 경쟁력의 핵심... 보안과 혁신 균형점 찾아야민간 소통 확대 및 구체적인 가이드라인 마련을 통해 미래 신기술 능동적 대응 촉구[보안뉴스= 류재철 충남대학교 컴퓨터융합학부 교수] 미토스의 등장이 세계적으로 큰 화제가 되고 있다. 27년간 찾지 못했던 취약점을 탐지하고, 다양한 취약점을 연계해 공격 코드를 생성하는 것을 보면
articles.summary: 기사가 제시한 내용에 대해 요약: AI의 보안과 혁신을 위해 논의한 인공지능과 광범위한 데이터 수집 기능을 통해 시스탄리아, 미국 환경 대표가 공개한 보안 지적에 대한 고급 인식을 나타내고자 한다.
points: AI로부터 보안에 어려움이 있는 중요성을 강조
27년간 탈취의 기본 약점 탐지 및 공격으로 더졌다
AI를 위한 보안 전문가를 선보이고, 이로부터 AI의 공식 대상 중심적인 지점을 제시
articles.insight: 이런 보안에 관한 일은 핵심으로 AI의 인간성과 공정성에 대해 다음 단계를 나눠왔습니다. AI가 인지와 사회적 친화를 학습하고, 이로부터 보안을 강화함으로써 인공지능의 영향을 줄 정신입니다.

articles.title: [카드뉴스] “비번은 바꿔도 DNA는 못 바꾼다”… 수백만명 ‘유전자 설계도’ 유출 비상
articles.description: 개인의 고유한 생물학적 정보인 유전자 데이터가 대규모로 유출되면서, 변경이 불가능한 ‘생체 설계도’가 사이버 범죄의 타겟이 되는 심각한 국면에 접어들었다. 유출된 정보는 단순 사생활 침해를 넘어 특정인의 유전적 취약점을 이용한 ‘맞춤형 생물학적 타겟팅’ 공격 등 인명에 치명적인 위협으로 이어질 수 있다. 보안의 패러다임이 IT 시스템 방어에서 인류의 생존과
articles.summary: 해외 IT 연구자가 기사를 요약했을 때의 내용
points: 유전적 정보가 공격을 받을 수 있다.
인명에 위협받기로 침해를 만들어야 함으로써 국민의 보호가 요구된다.
맞춤형 생체학과가 위협을 하기 전에 IT 보안을 강화해야 한다.
articles.insight: 이 기사는 IT/기술 업계에서 맞춤형 살아남은 인구를 위한 보호와 채췰가 더 중요해진 현상을 고루 다양한 점수로 그리드처럼 입니다.

articles.title: 스마트키퍼, 일본 NTT동일본에 물리보안 솔루션 공급
articles.description: NTT동일본 독점 계약으로 일본 시장 본격 진출“단순 공급 넘어 파트너십”... 글로벌 물리보안 기술력 검증 [보안뉴스 한세희 기자] 스마트키퍼(대표 안창훈)는 일본 통신·인프라 기업 NTT동일본(NTT East)과 물리보안 솔루션 공급 및 시장 확대를 위한 협력 계약을 체결했다고 밝혔다. 이번 협력은 단순 제품 공급 계약을 넘어, 일본 시장에서 물리보안

points: NTT동일본 독점 계약으로 일본 시장 본격 진출“단순 공급 넘어 파트너십”
글로벌 물리보안 기술력 검증 [보안뉴스 한세희 기자] 스마트키퍼(대표 안창훈)는 일본 통신·인프라 기업 NTT동일본(NTT East)과 물리보안 솔루션 공급 및 시장 확대를 위한 ...
이번 협력은 단순 제품 공급 계약을 넘어, 일본 시장에서 물리보안

articles.title: Meta will record employees’ keystrokes and use it to train its AI models
articles.description: Meta says that it has a new internal tool that is converting mouse movements and button clicks into data that can train its AI models.
articles.summary: Meta plans to use an internal tool that converts employee keystrokes, mouse movements, and click patterns into training data for their AI systems.
points: The new Meta system will record employees' keystrokes as they type on company devices
Mouse clicks are being converted by the hardware itself to produce input signals used in real-time applications like video games and virtual reality experiences within Meta’internal tool
Employees can control their mouse movements with subtle button presses which will be utilized for various tasks without directly touching buttons
articles.insight: This initiative signifies a shift towards more sophisticated and immersive AI experiences within the tech industry, potentially impacting human-computer interaction norms.

articles.title: Unauthorized group has gained access to Anthropic’s exclusive cyber tool Mythos, report claims
articles.description: Anthropic told TechCrunch it is investigating the claims, but maintains that there is no evidence that its systems have been impacted.
articles.summary: A report suggests an unautban group accessed Anthropic's advanced cyber tool Mythos without permission. The company denies any system disruptions but is probing the claims.
points: - Unauthorized party allegedly obtained access to Anthropi'c Mythos
- Company maintains its systems unaffected despite investigations
- Claims raise concerns about cybersecurity and data privacy
articles.insight: The incident, if true, would be a significant breach in the IT industry underscoring critical vulnerabilities. Anthropic's response will demonstrate its commitment to security.

articles.title: SpaceX is working with Cursor and has an option to buy the startup for $60B
articles.description: Only Elon would do this before an IPO.
articles.summary: SpaceX is collaborating with Cursor and has made a bid to acquire the company for $60 billion prior to its expected public offering.
points: Elon Musk's SpaceX intends to buy out startup competitor Cursor before it goes public
Proposed purchase price is an unpreceddeed amount, signaling major shift in industry dynamics
Impact on market and innovation landscape remains uncertain
articles.insight: SpaceX's acquisition of a startup could indicate its aggressive growth strategy but may raise concerns about competition within the IT/technology sector.

articles.title: Tim Cook is stepping down as CEO of Apple: Here’s a look at his 15-year legacy, from new products and services to China expansion
articles.description: Cook, who joined Apple in 1998, succeeded Steve Jobs as CEO in 2011 and went on to transform Apple into a $4 trillion powerhouse.
articles.summary: Tim Cook took over as CEO of Apple after Steve Jobs stepped down in 2011 and has since led the company to become a $4 trillion behemoth.
points: Cook became CEO upon his predecessor's retirement, inheriting an established brand with loyal customers worldwide.
Under Cook's leadership, Apple expanded significantly into emerging markets and invested heavily in new services such as Apple Pay and AppleCare+.
Tim Cook has focused on environmental sustainability within the company and continued to foster growth by launching more products under his tenure.
articles.insight: Cook's stewardship of Apple illustrates how a strong focus on services, market expansion, especially in China, along with dedication to corporate responsibility have been crucial for the company's unprecedented growth during his time as CEO.

articles.title: Apple’s John Ternus will run one of the world’s most powerful companies; the job is a minefield
articles.description: Apple's top job comes with almost unrivaled power and money, but it comes with plenty of baggage, too.
articles.summary: John Ternus has been chosen to run one of the most powerful companies in the world - Apple.
points: Apple's top job is described as coming with almost unrivaled power and money but also significant baggage.
The role involves leading a company that holds immense influence over technology markets, supply chains, global commerce rules and standards like copyright laws.
John Ternus replaces Tim Cook, who announced his retirement as CEO of Apple.
articles.insight: Ternus's appointment to run a company with such influence highlights the importance of leadership in shaping industry trends and standards within IT/technology sectors. His tenure will likely impact how companies navigate complex global operations, supply chains, and market competition.

articles.title: SusHi Tech Tokyo isn’t a conference — it’s a deal room with 60,000 people
articles.description: When 60,000 attendees descend on Tokyo Big Sight April 27–29, the headline numbers are hard to ignore: 750 startup exhibitors, 151 sessions, city leaders from 49 countries. But the stat that tells you what kind of event this actually is? It's 10,000 facilitated business meetings — brokered, booked, and tracked before most attendees even land.
articles.summary: SusHi Tech Tokyo is a unique event offering over 10,000 facilitated business meetings among its vast array of exhibitors and sessions.
points: - The core activity at SusHi Tech Tokyo involves thousands of brokered business engagements rather than conventional conference talks or workshops.
- Attendees can interact with startup entrepreneurs, city leaders from different countries, highlighting international networking opportunities.
- Sophisticated tracking and booking systems are in place for facilitated meetings to ensure efficient organization of interactions within the event.
articles.insight: The emphasis on brokered business engagements at SusHi Tech Tokyo signifies a shift towards more practical, relationship-driven networking events that go beyond typical conference formats. This could influence future industry conferences and large gatherings to adopt similar facilitation models.

articles.title: ChatGPT’s new Images 2.0 model is surprisingly good at generating text
articles.description: ChatGPT Images 2.0, the newest image generation model from OpenAI, shows just how much AI capabilities have evolved over the last few years.
articles.summary: OpenAI's ChatGPT Images 2.0 demonstrates significant advancements in image generation and text interpretation.
points: ChatGPT Images 2.0 is an advanced AI model from OpenAI capable of generating images with nuanced understanding and contextual relevance to the accompanying prompts or conversations.
The new iteration shows substantial improvement in image generation tasks compared to its predecessors, indicating rapid growth within machine learning algorithms used for generative purposes.
ChatGPT Images 2.0 has been integrated into various platforms and systems, expanding the application scope of AI-generated images beyond simple text outputs.
articles.insight: The development of ChatGPT Images 2.0 highlights a growing trend in combining visual content with artificial intelligence to create more engaging user experiences across different industries and platforms.

articles.title: Sam Altman throws shade at Anthropic’s cyber model, Mythos: ‘fear-based marketing’
articles.description: The AI industry's mudslinging continues.
articles.summary: Sam Altman criticizes Anthropic for using 'fear-based marketing' and a cyber model in their pitch to investors.
points: Anthropic uses fear as a tool in its AI development narrative, presenting itself with an existential threat rather than a solution
The company employs 'Mythos', or myth-making strategies within their pitch to induce doubt and concern about the future among investors
Sam Altman has publicly spoken against this marketing approach at TC Sessions: ai with Anthropic CEO Greg Brower in April 2discussions
articles.insight: This controversy underscores a deeper debate within the AI industry about ethical considerations, transparency of methods and intentions behind technology development.

articles.title: A look at Tim Cook’s 15-year legacy as CEO of Apple
articles.description: Cook, who joined Apple in 1998, succeeded Steve Jobs as CEO in 2011 and went on to transform Apple into a $4 trillion powerhouse.
articles.summary: Tim Cook has had an extraordinary impact since becoming CEO of Apple by driving the company's remarkable growth in value and market share.
points: Cook became CEO after Steve Jobs stepped down from his role at Apple
Under Tim Cook, Apple grew to a $4 trillion valuation without increasing its carbon footprint per device produced since the company's founding
The article also mentions that under Cook’s leadership, several key acquisitions have been made such as acquiring Beats Electronics and shipping 50 million iPads
articles.insight: Tim Cook has effectively led Apple in a changing tech landscape by focusing on sustainability while maintaining innovation and growth.
